rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Pay The Fees Of The Personal Representative; Pay The Ordinary Attorneys Fees And Costs; Distribute The Balance Of The Estate To Heirs Of The Decedent And Discharge The Petitioner
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 10, 2017. no file stamped copy of the petition delivered to the examiner in Room 202 and no proposed order provided. both documents must be provided in hard copy to the examiner in Room 202 no later than wednesday, april 5, 2017, in order to avoid an automatic continuance. please note-->the caption for the proposed order must begin with ORDER FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION. note also-->faxed or emailed copies and orders are not accepted.
